personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Legacy-to-Cloud Data Migration | PySpark / SQL / AWS

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience across legacy systems, SQL/PLSQL, Python, PySpark, ETL/ELT pipelines, data quality, and cloud data platforms. Strong background modernizing legacy data workflows, validating large migrations, designing warehouse/reporting layers, and building repeatable data pipelines for regulated financial-services environments. Hands-on AWS data engineering experience with S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, EC2/ECS, and PySpark; actively building Databricks, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog, dbt, and Azure lakehouse fluency to bridge legacy-to-modern cloud migration roles.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas and PySpark-oriented ETL pipelines that ingested and transformed telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints into curated datasets for capacity planning, analytics, and executive reporting.

Built a hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL patterns, Athena/Redshift analytics, and Oracle warehouse structures to support scalable reporting and forecasting workloads.
Designed data validation, reconciliation, cleansing, and quality-control routines to improve trust in operational datasets used by engineering, capacity, and infrastructure stakeholders.
Migrated heavy forecasting and analytics workloads from on-premise Oracle patterns toward cloud-scale Redshift processing, improving parallelism and reducing operational friction.
Implemented reusable Python automation for data loading, transformation, exception handling, operational reporting, and repeatable pipeline execution across production support workflows.
Documented data flows, schemas, validation logic, operational runbooks, and stakeholder-facing reports to support maintainability, troubleshooting, and handoff across teams.
Applied regulated-enterprise governance practices around data access, retention, auditability, and secure operational reporting in a financial-services environment.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping-engine data platform from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster while preserving transaction correctness and sub-second query expectations.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation and testing utilities to compare source and target records across millions of transactions during phased migration cutovers.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, and migration support routines to improve repeatability and reduce production cutover risk.
Partnered with architecture and operations teams to optimize SQL, database access patterns, and migration design for high-volume enterprise workloads.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer, Billing Interfaces and Legacy Systems
bullets: Developed and supported telecom billing interfaces across COBOL, C, C++, Pro*C, PL/SQL, Oracle, XML, Korn Shell, Syncsort, and mainframe-adjacent batch processing environments.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting components across legacy data and integration workflows.
Delivered performance improvements in billing processes, including memory reduction, throughput improvement, and SQL/database sequence optimization.
Reverse-engineered and documented undocumented vendor APIs and legacy interfaces to support integration, troubleshooting, and future maintenance.
Automated deployment and administration tasks using Korn Shell scripts across UNIX/Linux environments, reducing manual operational effort.

experience.title: Senior Consultant / CA APM SME
bullets: Built Perl/Korn Shell and SQL-driven extraction/reporting scripts that replaced manual performance data exports and improved repeatability of weekly reporting.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and documentation standards used across enterprise monitoring environments.
Collaborated with application, middleware, and operations teams to resolve performance bottlenecks and improve production support workflows.

education.degree: Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, PL/SQL, PySpark, Perl, Korn Shell, C, C++, Java, COBOL concepts/exposure, XML, JSON, YAML

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform on AWS
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, Parquet, and PySpark-oriented processing patterns. Focused on raw-to-curated data movement, compression, query optimization, and reliable analytics consumption.

projects.name: HorizonScale — Capacity Forecasting Data Pipeline
projects.description: Built a forecasting and analytics pipeline that transformed operational telemetry into curated datasets for capacity risk analysis, dashboarding, and stakeholder reporting.

projects.name: Databricks / Delta Lake Learning Track
projects.description: Hands-on self-study and project work covering Delta Lake ACID patterns, time travel, schema enforcement, MERGE/upsert concepts, medallion architecture, Unity Catalog governance concepts, and Databricks workflow patterns.
